text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Crazy. Was the Droit always such a<n>huge event?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No! This year was the biggest it's<n>ever been! And I think our dance had<n>something to do with that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You really think so? Hold on, are you<n>sure it's okay for the ever-popular<n>Fuji to be out here right now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If I remember right, you've got a<n>closing speech to give. You've got it<n>rough, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd get some air before that.<n>And I hope you realize you're just as<n>popular. All your friends were looking<n>for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'd rather avoid being made fun of...<n>But if you came to give your thanks,<n>I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I knew you were sharp. You<n>still don't have a grasp on how I<n>really feel though.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Sky... for being my date.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I wasn't mistaken about you. You<n>were the ultimate trickster. The<n>cheers were proof of that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Our dance became a wonderful<n>memory for everyone there. Hehe,<n>thank you so much. I'm sorry I<n>wouldn't take no for an answer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No need to apologize. I'm the one<n>who accepted your deal. And you<n>probably...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, you got to know all about<n>Shakur's peculiar skills and all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Heh, I really need to thank her as<n>well. I have a feeling I'll be organizing<n>quite a few scrimmages starting next<n>week.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I bet my adorable ponies are<n>starting to worry. I should head back.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. There was something I<n>wanted to tell you too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Lend me your ear...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: U-uh?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Your dress... looks beautiful on you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I had trouble telling you because... you<n>really do resemble a goddess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Fooled you good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Another big surprise in the bag. Phew,<n>I really wanted to get even after you<n>sucked me into all this, so I went with<n>the cool, suave approach. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: With that said, isn't it about time?<n>Good luck with your speech. See ya!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...What a shock. Hehe, you didn't<n>need to do that if you're going to get<n>embarrassed about it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (But it seems like she's really feeling<n>better. I'm glad.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (Being the leader of another dorm, I<n>was afraid of stepping in too much.<n>But I couldn't help it seeing the state<n>she was in.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right. It wasn't a real date, but I<n>got my compliment. Nothing left but to<n>give a spectacular speech.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Now that we've announced this<n>evening's "best couple," it's time to<n>close out the night!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone. Did you all enjoy<n>this year's Ligne Droite? For some of<n>you, it was your first time... For<n>others, it was perhaps your last.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All of us, though, will always be<n>striving forward. And wherever we<n>may go, every day we'll be running<n>until both our bodies and our hearts<n>are worn out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's what we chose, and we'll<n>never stop chasing after our dreams.<n>But the next time you think you can't<n>take another step... remember this<n>night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You, the runner next to you... You're<n>all running down your own paths in<n>life. Remember that each and every<n>one of you is beautiful... and the star<n>of your own story.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Only you can run down that final<n>stretch. So follow your heart, dash<n>ahead... and cross the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I knew it... I'm just not the right<n>match for Fuji. I can't... match that<n>beauty.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll get you back for making me dance<n>to your tune... my dear date.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I sense a big hassle<n>approaching. But since I'm so close<n>to thinking up a new racing strategy, I<n>guess I'll have to...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Run away! ♪
